ConnectionStrings.AppDb: Data Source=localhost;Initial Catalog=EnterprisePlatform;Integrated Security=True;Persist Security Info=False;Pooling=False;MultipleActiveResultSets=False;Encrypt=True;TrustServerCertificate=True;Application Name=Enterprise.Platform;Command Timeout=0

_azureAdComment: Entra ID (B2B) validation — the Api NEVER issues tokens, only validates them. ClientId + TenantId MUST match the SPA's runtime config (ClientApp/public/config.json). Audiences are what THIS Api accepts (aud claim); AllowedIssuers validates the iss claim against the specific tenant.
_corsComment: Post-Phase-9: browsers never call this Api directly — they call the BFF (:5001 / :7197), which forwards server-to-server over Authorization: Bearer (no cookies on the Api hop). AllowCredentials is therefore FALSE here; the credentialed-cookie path lives on the BFF. AllowedOrigins are kept narrow for the dev tooling that DOES open this Api directly: Swagger UI on :5044, the BFF host (when a developer calls Api endpoints from a browser session opened against the BFF), and `ng serve` on :4200 for exploratory work that bypasses the BFF. Production sets these via the release pipeline; never use "*".
